name: chain_i_just_hit_3830_in_total_revenue_with_m
method: I just hit $3830 in total revenue with my app

stages.task: scrape r/MicroSaas for posts containing revenue milestones ($1K–$10K+), extract: app_type, pricing, distribution_method, time_to_revenue, stack mentioned
cluster by app category, rank by (revenue / build_time), identify which categories are underrepresented in current app factory builds
trigger app_factory_autopilot.py for top-ranked uncovered template, skip if already built or in queue
